events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Structural bolting, turn-of-nut match marks absent or not rotated. Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Missing turn-of-nut marks means bolt tension not verified; high risk for structural connection. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound etc default. Findings: match marks absent, turn-of-nut not performed/verified. Actions: remove/re-tighten per RCSC turn-of-nut method, apply match marks after proper tensioning, inspect. Rationale: RCSC requires turn-of-nut method to verify pretension; absent marks indicate incomplete/non-compliant tensioning. References: RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 7 (turn-of-nut method). Need exact JSON shape. Ensure no prose outside JSON.

    "Mark the bolt/nut assembly with match marks after achieving required rotation from snug-tight",

  ],
  "rationale": "RCSC requires the turn-of-nut method to demonstrate that high-strength bolts have been brought to the required pretension. Absent or unrotated match marks mean the connection cannot be verified as properly tensioned, creating a structural non-compliance.",

  ]
